summary: Asset-ID Format mit Modell-Suffixen - All Tests PASS. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: Modal shows correct format [Device-ID]-[TYP]-[MODELL], dropdown with all 18 asset types with new suffixes working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asset-ID format with model suffixes fully implemented and verified. New format: [device_id]-[TYP]-[MODELL]. Example: AAHC01-01-TAB-SP4 (Surface Pro 4). All 18 asset types have correct suffixes including: TAB-SP4, TAB-SP6, TAB-TSR, SCA-TSR, SCA-DSK, TDO-QER, TDO-TSR, SDO-DSK, SDO-TSR, TPS-SPX, TPS-TSR, SPS-DSK, SPS-TSR, USB, LAN, 12V, KIT-SFD, KIT-TSR. Modal shows Asset-ID Vorschau with real-time preview.
